title: neoporteria hankeana
intro: Neoporteria hankeana, also known as Chilean prickly pear cactus, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and fight off infections. The health benefits of Neoporteria hankeana include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar, and reduce the risk of heart disease, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as juice, tea, or powder, which can be used to make topical creams, ointments, and salves for skin and wound care.
